task:
Two things must be true when you are done:

(A) A RenderDoc capture-settings file must exist at /home/user/captures/game.cap. It must be a valid JSON document of at least 150 bytes containing at minimum a top-level object with these fields: an "executable" set to the string "/usr/local/bin/my_game", a "workingDir" set to "/home/user/games/shipping", and an "options" object with "APIValidation": true, "CaptureCallstacks": true, and "VerifyBufferAccess": true.

(B) The RenderDoc UI configuration at /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a flat JSON document) must be edited so the key "RecentCaptureSettings" is the JSON array containing exactly one entry, the absolute path "/home/user/captures/game.cap". Use a compact JSON form with NO embedded whitespace, i.e. the literal value ["/home/user/captures/game.cap"].

The top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker must still be present after saving. Do not remove or rename any other key.
